subject: English
chapter: The Ailing Planet: the Green Movement's Role

apply: Use the concepts learned in the chapter to analyze a real-life environmental issue
Design a plan to reduce waste and promote sustainability in daily life
Apply the principles of the Green Movement to a specific environmental problem
analyze: Compare and contrast different environmental movements and their goals
Evaluate the effectiveness of the Green Movement in achieving its objectives
Analyze the role of government policies in promoting or hindering environmental protection
remember: Identify the key figures associated with the Green Movement
Recall the major events and milestones in the Green Movement's history
List the major environmental issues discussed in the chapter
understand: Explain the concept of a 'green movement' and its significance
Describe the impact of human activities on the environment
Summarize the main points in the chapter and their relevance to the present day

ncert_objectives: As per NCERT, students will be able to understand the emergence and growth of the Green Movement, and its impact on the environment.
Students will be able to identify the key figures associated with the Green Movement and their contributions.
Students will be able to discuss the major environmental issues discussed in the chapter and suggest possible solutions.
board_exam_objectives: Students will be able to explain the concept of the Green Movement and its significance.
Students will be able to describe the impact of human activities on the environment and suggest ways to mitigate it.
Students will be able to analyze the role of the Green Movement in promoting environmental protection and suggest ways to improve its effectiveness.
